title: pedilonum crenatifolium
intro: Pedilonum crenatifolium is a plant species in the family Pedilanthaceae. It is a shrub-like plant native to tropical Africa, often found in humid forests. The medicinal properties of Pedilonum crenatifolium have been reported to include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of the plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system, and it is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
